text:
sunpoet     2010-10-08 17:49:58 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    astro                Makefile 
  Added files:
    astro/gpxloggerd     Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  - Add gpxloggerd 0.1
  
  The gpxloggerd is a tiny daemon that connects to gpsd(8) and logs
  received fix information in the GPX format.
  
  PR:             ports/151308
  Submitted by:   glebius
  Approved by:    pgollucci (mentor, implicit)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.151     +1 -0      ports/astro/Makefile
  1.1       +25 -0     ports/astro/gpxloggerd/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/astro/gpxloggerd/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/astro/gpxloggerd/pkg-descr (new)
